pending.body: finding_summary: The fixture's milestone plan and staged bead graph are disconnected. `scenario_bundle()` defines milestone beads `ms-e2e-scenario.bead-1..3` with titles like "Initialize temp workspace" and "Validate mock adapter flow" [src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:155-202], but `scenario_bead_graph_issues()` and the mocked `br`/`bv` outputs expose `ms-e2e-scenario.root-epic`, `ms-e2e-scenario.task-prepare-workspace`, and `ms-e2e-scenario.task-validate-mocks` with different titles [src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:219-315,342-363]. Plan-aware code only confirms milestone membership when the selected bead matches a proposal by id or title [src/cli/project.rs:1342-1414], so this fixture cannot actually exercise the real milestone-linked path it is supposed to support. affected_files: ["src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs", "src/cli/project.rs"] remediation_hint: Derive the `.beads` graph and mock adapter payloads from the same bead ids/titles used in `scenario_bundle()` so the selected bead resolves back to the milestone plan.

finding_summary: The preloaded `br create` mock returns `Created bead ms-e2e-scenario.task-validate-mocks` [src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:348-352], but that id is already present in the staged bead graph as the existing validation task [src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:275-315]. Creation/reconciliation code resolves the created bead id from `br create` stdout and then inspects that bead [src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:4056-4095], so reusing an existing id makes the fixture unusable for any creation flow and can mask duplicate-id bugs. affected_files: ["src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs", "src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs"] remediation_hint: Return a distinct synthetic id for the mocked create response and queue a matching `show` payload for that new bead, or avoid embedding an existing bead id in the mocked stdout.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
